title: Step 1 — A lane and a stage

props.covers: Step 1 of the worked example: one row split at 1:4 — a config lane pinned NW at its natural size (R7) with three stacked pills, and a stage section holding a placeholder sticky.

text.insert: Step 1 — A lane and a stage
puts two bands side by side at 1:4. The config section is pinned to the top-left corner with
and stays at its natural size — the R7 lane. Inside it, three pills share the slot, stacked N / C / S with ladder gaps (R2). The stage section holds a placeholder sticky for what comes next.
